arxiv_papers.title: MIDSim: Simulating Multi-Channel Information Diffusion in Social Media with LLM-Powered Multi-Agent System

arxiv_papers.snippet: Social media platforms like TikTok have become a key source of health information, with studies reporting inaccuracies in posts.
